title: glyceria micrantha
intro: Glyceria micrantha, also known as small-fruited mannagrass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Glyceria micrantha can help alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, providing numerous health benefits to those who use it. Herbal preparations of Glyceria micrantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
